query:
insert into ElementIdents (
                    last_collect_nr,
                    product_id,
                    filepath,
                    file_hash,
                    definition_line,
                    ident
                )
                values (
                    $1,
                    $2,
                    $3,
                    $4,
                    $5,
                    $6
                )
                on conflict (product_id, filepath, file_hash, definition_line)
                do update set
                    ident = excluded.ident
